race.description: Mrc Membership Made Of Moments 3YOF Hcp (Bm64)
race.comment: Open race. OFF THEIR PERCH (2) ran into a handy one first up that was well backed in Saturday class next time out before destroying her rivals at Sale on heavy ground from midfield. Harder now but the rise to a mile suits perfectly and with a good ride early she can win again. HIMALAYAN (5) found the 2000m a bridge too far at Flemington but still ran well and back to a mile here can see her strong late in easier company. Her run at Caulfield three back was very good when covering ground. BEAUTIFULLY (3) continues to race well and should be fighting out the finish again, especially if they're more positive from a wide gate with the option to roll forward.  MELEYS (4) has won two on the bounce and will take holding out again.
